{{CargoRelic
|name=Air Cannon
|class_id=20034
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=It uses the most advanced compressor in the 22nd century and can instantly compress air ten times smaller. Many balloon vendors have pre-ordered this product.
|fame=11
|art=17
|fth=16
|civ=20
|tech=26
|ss1=Snail ATK +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +30
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
